title: Promulgation of rules and regulations
doc_html:
§3208. Promulgation of rules and regulations

            The department shall promulgate, in accordance with the Administrative Procedure Act, any such rules and regulations as are necessary to implement the provisions of the Chapter.

            Acts 2019, No. 160, §1.
doc_text:
§3208.  Promulgation of rules and regulations
The department shall promulgate, in accordance with the Administrative Procedure
Act, any such rules and regulations as are necessary to implement the provisions of the
Chapter.
Acts 2019, No. 160, §1.
